title: Provisioning Runs
description: Provisioning lifecycle status, step progress, blocker diagnosis, and retry/cancel surface. Directly bound to 2 OpenAPI operations (createProvisioningRun, getProvisioningRunStatus) and 5 AsyncAPI events (provisioning.run.requested, provisioning.run.started, provisioning.step.changed, provisioning.run.completed, provisioning.run.failed). Fully asynchronous model — no OpenAPI endpoint returns synchronous provisioning success. Pack-independent: provisioning steps may involve pack activation, but the monitoring surface is infrastructure governance. Same-workspace incoming navigation from control-plane.tenants.bootstrap.

dataSources.description: Initiate an asynchronous provisioning run for an approved bootstrap request. Returns 202 Accepted.
Get current state of a provisioning run including overall status, step summary, blockers, and linked artifacts.
AsyncAPI event emitted when operator initiates a provisioning run.
AsyncAPI event emitted when the provisioning orchestrator begins executing a queued run.
AsyncAPI event emitted when a provisioning step transitions state. May fire multiple times per run.
AsyncAPI event emitted when all provisioning steps complete successfully.
AsyncAPI event emitted when a provisioning run fails. Includes failure details and affected step.
